steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase, having 9,721 feet of prominence, must modify the thing that actually has that prominence. The subject after the comma therefore needs to be Pico do Ramelau, not people, a list, or a ranking.

steps.title: Avoid dangling modifiers
steps.content: Choice B makes a list possess the prominence. Choice C makes geographers possess it. Choice D makes a ranking possess it. Only the remaining choice places the mountain itself immediately after the modifier. The answer is A.
